text: I feel a certain disorientation, as if the world has tilted and ordinary perspectives have shifted. The lighting is sterile, and there is a lingering sense of anticipation in these structured, silent corridors. Entering the colorful, information-rich space stirs curiosity. I am drawn to question the artificial boundaries between knowledge, research, and my own perception. This environment compels me to reflect on how easily context alters meaning and how uncertain I am of what comes next.
